metadata.title: States PCS: Uttar Pradesh GK Questions for UPPSC Examinations

questions.question: Which of the following statements regarding the Satkhanda are correct? It was intended as a seven-storeyed watchtower. It was completed during the reign of Wajid Ali Shah. Select the correct option using the codes given below:
questions.explanation: Satkhanda, meaning “seven-storeyed,” was envisioned as a multi-level watchtower near Chhota Imambara, Lucknow. Its construction began under Muhammad Ali Shah but was left incomplete upon his death and was not finished during Wajid Ali Shah’s reign. Hence, only statement 1 is correct; statement 2 is incorrect.

questions.question: Consider the following: Assertion (A): Chhayavad poetry is often described as the romantic phase of modern Hindi literature. Reason (R): Chhayavad poets emphasized personal emotions, mysticism, nature, and spiritual introspection. Which of the following is / are correct?

options.label: A
options.text: Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A

options.label: B
options.text: Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A

options.label: C
options.text: A is true but R is false

options.label: D
options.text: A is false but R is true

answer.label: A
answer.text: Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A

questions.explanation: Chhayavad is indeed regarded as the romantic phase of modern Hindi literature. Poets like Nirala, Pant, and others focused on subjective emotions, inner experiences, mysticism, and the beauty of nature. These characteristics closely align with romantic literary traditions. The reason correctly explains why Chhayavad poetry is described as romantic, making both the assertion and reason true with correct linkage.

questions.question: Consider the following literary works: Sursagar Satsai Ramcharitmanas Padmavat Which of the above were composed in Braj Bhasha?Select the correct answer using the codes given below:
questions.explanation: Sursagar by Surdas and Satsai by Bihari Lal were composed in Braj Bhasha. Ramcharitmanas by Tulsidas and Padmavat by Malik Muhammad Jayasi were composed in Awadhi, not Braj Bhasha. Thus, only Sursagar and Satsai are in Braj Bhasha, while the other works are not.

questions.question: Consider the following products associated with Uttar Pradesh: Hathras Hing Banaras Thandai Adamchini Chawal Which of the above is / are Geographical Indication (GI) protected products?
questions.explanation: All three products—Hathras Hing, Banaras Thandai, and Adamchini Chawal—are included in the list of GI-protected products of Uttar Pradesh. Following 20 products of Uttar Pradesh are GI protected. Allahabad Surkha Guava Banaras Tirangi Barfi Mango Malihabadi Dusseheri Pratapgarh Aonla Kalanamak Rice Adamchini Chawal (Rice) Basmati Hathras Hing Rataul Mango Banaras Langda Aam (Mango) Mahoba Desawari Pan Ramnagar Bhanta (Brinjal) Banaras Lal Bharwamirch Muzaffarnagar Gur (Jaggery) Hathras Hing Banaras Pan (Betel Leaf) Banaras Lal Peda Chiraigaon Karonda of Varanasi Jaunpur Imarti Banaras Thandai

questions.question: Amir Khusro pioneered the development of which language? [UPPSC 2002]
questions.explanation: Amir Khusro pioneered Khadiboli, the early form of modern Hindi–Urdu. Writing in Hindavi, he blended Persian influence with the spoken dialect of Delhi, laying the foundation for standard Hindi and Urdu. Braj Bhasha, Awadhi, and Bhojpuri developed separately in different periods and regions.

questions.question: Who was the husband of Rani Laxmi Bai? [UPPCL 2015]
questions.explanation: Rani Laxmi Bai’s husband was Raja Gangadhar Rao Newalkar, ruler of Jhansi. They married in 1842. His death and the British refusal to recognize their adopted son led to Jhansi’s participation in the 1857 revolt. Other options were Peshwas or relatives, not her spouse.

questions.question: The IEDUP is headquartered at which city? [UPPSC 2016]
questions.explanation: Institute of Entrepreneurship Development Uttar Pradesh (IEDUP) is headquartered in Lucknow, the state capital. It is the nodal agency for entrepreneurship promotion, skill and capacity building in Uttar Pradesh. Kanpur, Varanasi, and Prayagraj are prominent cities but not headquarters of IEDUP.

questions.question: Which of the following is not a Kathak artist? [PCSMain2008]
questions.explanation: Kishan Maharaj was a renowned tabla maestro from Banaras Gharana, not a Kathak dancer. The other listed artists—Birju Maharaj, Lacchu Maharaj, and Sitara Devi—are celebrated exponents of the Kathak dance form native to Uttar Pradesh.

questions.question: The first Central University of Uttar Pradesh was [UPPSC 2011, UDA 2014]
questions.explanation: Allahabad University, established in 1887 and declared a central university in 2005, was Uttar Pradesh’s first central university. BHU and AMU became central universities in 1916 and 1920, respectively, while Dr. Bhimrao Ambedkar University gained the status only in 1996.

questions.question: Saurabh Chaudhary is associated with which sport? [Assistant Teacher 2018]
questions.explanation: Saurabh Chaudhary is an ace Indian shooter, specializing in the 10 m air pistol event. He has won gold in Asian Games 2018, Youth Olympic Games 2018, and multiple ISSF World Cups, holding world and junior records. He hails from Uttar Pradesh.
